rationale: The citing paper references Manchanda, Rossi, and Chintagunta (2004) only once, in the limitations/future research section, as an example of modeling the supply side of firms' contact policies. The cited work is not used to build hypotheses, specify the main Bayesian customer-selection model, estimate parameters, or interpret core findings. Its role is a pointer to related methodology rather than a direct input to the paper's contribution.
